description: Chapter 2.6.6 - Listening History Analytics & Personal Music Insights. Create a dedicated analytics/insights page (app/insights or as a tab in favorites) that transforms listening history into meaningful stories with visualizations: listening summary, top songs/artists/albums rankings, genre analytics with percentage rings, GitHub-style listening heatmap, music taste evolution timeline, achievements system, and discovery analytics. All local-first using cached calculations from localStorage history data.
steps: Create app/components/favorites/analytics/ directory for all new components

Create lib/analytics.ts - Analytics calculation engine: computeListeningSummary (today/week/month/year/allTime), computeTopSongs (rank by play count), computeTopArtists, computeTopAlbums, computeGenreAnalytics (share percentages), computeHeatmapData (daily listening mapped to calendar grid), computeTasteEvolution (genre trends over time by month), computeListeningStreak, computeAchievements, computeTimeDistribution (morning/afternoon/evening/night). Cache results in useMemo with dependency on history length/last-entry timestamp to avoid recalculating on every render

Create InsightsHero.tsx - Glass Level 5 hero dashboard: animated counters for Listening Hours, Songs Played, Albums Explored, Artists Discovered, Genres Explored, Current Streak. Background from top album artwork with dominant colors gradient + blur + glass overlay
Create ListeningSummary.tsx - Summary cards for Today, This Week, This Month, This Year, All Time. Each shows hours, songs, artists, albums, sessions. Glass-light cards with animated counters (700ms)
Create ActivityOverview.tsx - Cards for Daily/Weekly/Monthly listening, Average Session Length, Longest Session, Favorite Listening Time (time of day). Glass-subtle styling
Create TopSongsChart.tsx - Ranked list (top 20) with: rank number, artwork, song, artist, play count, listening time, trend indicator (up/down/stable), preview button. Supports 'Show More' expansion
Create TopArtistsChart.tsx - Ranked artist cards with: portrait, artist name, play count, hours, albums count, genres, trend indicator, open artist link
Create TopAlbumsChart.tsx - Ranked albums with: artwork, album, artist, listening hours, completion percentage bar, last played, open album link
Create GenreAnalytics.tsx - Genre cards with animated SVG percentage rings (CSS-only, no chart library), showing genre share, listening hours, song count, artist count. Sorted by share descending

Create ListeningHeatmap.tsx - GitHub-style 52-week calendar grid (CSS grid, no external library). Each cell colored by intensity based on songs played that day. Hover tooltip shows date, hours, songs. Color scale from glass-subtle to primary. Responsive: scrollable on mobile
Create ListeningTimeline.tsx - Monthly activity bars (CSS-only bar chart) showing relative listening volume per month, interactive hover states with details
Create TasteEvolution.tsx - Visual timeline showing how top genres shifted over months. Simple connected node visualization with month labels and genre pills, showing genre transitions

Create Achievements.tsx - Achievement cards (Glass Level 4 with gold accent border) for milestones: First Favorite Song, 100/500/1000 Songs Played, 100 Artists Explored, Album Collector, Genre Explorer, Night Owl, Weekend Listener, Discovery Enthusiast. Each shows: icon, title, description, progress bar, unlocked/locked state. Animated unlock shimmer for earned achievements
Create DiscoveryAnalytics.tsx - Cards showing: New Artists discovered, New Albums, New Songs, Genres Explored count. Glass-light styling
Create RecommendationInsights.tsx - Based on analytics, show why certain artists/genres are recommended: 'Your fastest-growing genre', 'Artists you might like based on X'
Create AnalyticsSearch.tsx - Search across songs, artists, albums, genres within analytics rankings
Create InsightsSkeleton.tsx - Progressive loading skeleton for hero, charts, and cards
Create EmptyInsights.tsx - Premium empty state: 'Start listening to unlock insights', buttons (Browse Music, Trending Songs, Discover Artists)
Add an 'Insights' tab to app/favorites/page.tsx alongside existing tabs
Ensure all chart/visualization elements are accessible: use role='img' with aria-label descriptions, provide text alternatives for visual data
Ensure full keyboard navigation, ARIA labels, semantic HTML, focus-visible indicators
Responsive: desktop multi-column dashboard, tablet adaptive grid, mobile single-column with swipeable sections
acceptance_criteria: Insights tab appears in favorites page navigation
Hero dashboard renders with animated counters and dynamic artwork background
Listening summary cards show correct calculated stats for each time period
Top songs/artists/albums rankings render in correct order by play count
Genre analytics shows percentage rings that animate on first render
Listening heatmap renders a 52-week calendar grid with correct intensity colors
Taste evolution timeline shows genre shifts over time
Achievements system shows unlocked/locked state based on actual history data
Empty state renders when no listening history exists
All visualizations are CSS-only (no external chart libraries required)
Analytics calculations are cached and do not recalculate on every render
bun run lint passes with zero errors
bun run build succeeds with zero errors
verification: Run `bun run lint` and confirm zero errors
Run `bun run build` and confirm successful compilation
